events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: residential electrical job, conductor selection & sizing, observed condition is "undersized for load + length (voltage drop)", work in-progress. Reference NEC 310, Table 310.16.

This is a non-compliant condition - undersized conductors causing voltage drop. This is a fail. The conductors are installed-defective and non-compliant.

Let me produce the JSON.
